positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric composition featuring abstract cosmic elements. The central subject is a stylized nebula forming a luminous heart shape, surrounded by orbiting geometric planetary rings and minimalist celestial constellations. Use a color palette of deep indigo, vibrant cyan, electric violet, and soft gold accents. The composition should have strong contrast between dark cosmic void areas and bright, glowing celestial structures. Style should be neo-art deco, clean vector line art mixed with gradient nebula washes. Ideal for a repeating background print on apparel, emphasizing clean silhouettes and bold, centralized design elements. High-contrast edges, deep saturated colors, ultra-detailed, perfect symmetry, vector illustration quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, signatures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, low detail, photorealistic, 3d rendering, messy, busy, gradients over-applied
